seoTitle: Bundanoon vs Bunjil — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bundanoon and Bunjil. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bundanoon and Bunjil.
heading: Bundanoon vs Bunjil — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bundanoon, Western Australia and Bunjil, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bundanoon and Bunjil have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Bundanoon or Bunjil safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bundanoon has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Bunjil scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bundanoon scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Bunjil scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bundanoon or Bunjil?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bundanoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
